canonical_definition: Targeted Probe Perturbation (TPP), a procedure that ablates latents for one class and measures the effect on that class and other classes to assess disentanglement.
papers: Learning Multi-Level Features with Matryoshka Sparse Autoencoders
SAEBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Sparse Autoencoders in Language Model Interpretability
